description: Controlled vocabulary of industry sectors in the Hong Kong job market. Used for sector field in role data files and hiringIndustries references.

sectors.name: Banking & Finance
sectors.description: Retail banking, investment banking, asset management, private equity, and insurance.

sectors.name: Technology & IT
sectors.description: Software development, IT services, data & analytics, cybersecurity, and AI.

sectors.name: Professional Services
sectors.description: Consulting, audit & accounting, legal services, ESG, and human resources.

sectors.name: Marketing & E-commerce
sectors.description: Digital marketing, brand management, e-commerce, advertising, and public relations.

sectors.name: Engineering & Construction
sectors.description: Civil engineering, building services, construction management, and infrastructure development.

sectors.name: Logistics & Supply Chain
sectors.description: Logistics, shipping, supply chain management, procurement, and trade operations.

sectors.name: Retail & E-commerce
sectors.description: Retail operations, e-commerce platforms, consumer goods, and omni-channel commerce.

sectors.name: Insurance
sectors.description: Life insurance, general insurance, reinsurance, and insurtech.

sectors.name: Healthcare & Pharmaceuticals
sectors.description: Clinical healthcare, pharmaceuticals, medical devices, health informatics, and biotech.

sectors.name: Government & Public Sector
sectors.description: Hong Kong SAR government, statutory bodies, public utilities, and NGOs.
